purpose: Classify failures in Vision skill package evaluation and route them to the right repair layer.

categories.description: Problems caused by missing, conflicting, or weak source material.

subcategories.description: The package lacks key upstream context needed to answer correctly.
subcategories.default_action: Add or map stronger supporting material.

subcategories.description: Demo behavior and supporting materials conflict.
subcategories.default_action: Record the conflict and choose a project-level rule.

subcategories.description: The imported demo itself is too weak to seed a reliable package.
subcategories.default_action: Treat the demo as seed only and rewrite package structure.

categories.description: Problems caused by missing or wrong package/skill specification.

subcategories.description: The interaction protocol is underspecified or contradictory.
subcategories.default_action: Tighten the package contract or skill blueprint.

subcategories.description: The expected output structure is unclear or incomplete.
The eval expectations do not actually test the intended behavior.

categories.description: Problems caused by shared rendering, shared prompt pattern, or shared package template.

subcategories.description: The shared template pushes the package toward generic, average answers.
subcategories.default_action: Reduce generic scaffolding and restore sharper package identity.

subcategories.description: The shared template causes VisionTree voice drift.
Shared checkpoint wording exists, but does not create real stage behavior.
subcategories.default_action: Rework checkpoint design and test branches explicitly.

categories.description: Problems local to one specific package's content.

subcategories.description: The package responds with surface advice instead of actual analysis.
subcategories.default_action: Improve examples, output contract, or guidance depth.

subcategories.description: High-pressure or sensitive cases are handled weakly.
The package output is difficult to parse or inconsistent.
